title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.810 - Eminent domain, public hearing required before taking property
text:
262.810.  Eminent domain, public hearing required before taking property. — Property subject to the farmland protection act shall not be taken in whole or in part by any political subdivision of this state by eminent domain except after a public hearing pursuant to chapter 610.
(L. 2001 S.B. 462)
